allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\("C:\\Users\\iamso\\Downloads\\CURA_PRD_v2_0.docx"\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq "word/document.xml" }; $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $reader.Close\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $content | Out-File -FilePath "C:\\Temp\\cura_document.xml" -Encoding utf8; Write-Output "Done, length: $\($content.Length\)")
